fire-bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire-bolt.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage.

ray-of-frost.name: Ray of Frost
ray-of-frost.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage, and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

mage-hand.name: Mage Hand
mage-hand.description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. You can use the hand to manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, or pour out a vial.

light.name: Light
light.description: You touch one object that is no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. It sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.
